name: Chocolate Chip Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Add flour and beat until smooth.
5. Stir in Hershey Mini-Chips.
6. Scoop small tablespoons of dough around each chocolate piece, covering completely.
7. Shape into balls and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until set.
9. Cool slightly on the cookie sheet, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Drizzle Chocolate Topping over each cooled cookie.
